languages.original_text: {n}Trazyn's gaze fixes on Seberian — and the sword he clutches in his hands. The Necron's tone becomes caustic, an acid that burns to the very soul.{/n} "I see you have found your precious toy once more, little thief.... This is a momentous occasion in its own way. This all began when the Crimson Dance of Khaine fell into your hands, and this is where it will end. For you, and for your last surviving heir."

languages.text: {n}Взгляд Тразина застывает на Себериане — и мече, который тот сжимает в руках. Голос некрона обращается едкой кислотой, прожигающей самую душу.{/n} "Я вижу, ты вновь отыскал свою драгоценную игрушку, маленький воришка... По своему это знаковое событие. С Багряной пляски Кхейна, попавшей в твои руки, все и началось — с ним же все и закончится. И для тебя, и для твое{mf|го|й} последн{mf|его|ей} уцелевше{mf|го|й} наследни{mf|ка|цы}".

languages.text: {n}La mirada de Trazyn se clava en Seberian y la espada que aferra en sus manos. La voz del Necrón se torna mordaz, tan ácida que podría quemarte por dentro.{/n} «Veo que has encontrado tu preciado juguete, ladronzuelo.... Esta es una ocasión trascendental. Todo comenzó cuando la Danza Carmesí de Khaine cayó en tus manos, y aquí es donde acabará. Para ti, y para {mf|el|la} últim{mf|o|a} de los herederos que aún viven».
languages.original_text: {n}Trazyn's gaze fixes on Seberian — and the sword he clutches in his hands. The Necron's tone becomes caustic, an acid that burns to the very soul.{/n} "I see you have found your precious toy once more, little thief.... This is a momentous occasion in its own way. This all began when the Crimson Dance of Khaine fell into your hands, and this is where it will end. For you, and for your last surviving heir."

languages.text: {n}特拉金的目光锁定在塞贝里安身上，以及他手中的那把剑。太空死灵的语气变得尖刻，如同能灼伤灵魂的酸液。{/n}“看来你又找回了你那件珍贵的玩物，小贼……从某种意义上说，这还挺有纪念意义的。一切都始于这柄凯恩的猩红之舞落入你手之时，如今也将在此终结。不光是你，还有你那硕果仅存的继承人。”
languages.original_text: {n}Trazyn's gaze fixes on Seberian — and the sword he clutches in his hands. The Necron's tone becomes caustic, an acid that burns to the very soul.{/n} "I see you have found your precious toy once more, little thief.... This is a momentous occasion in its own way. This all began when the Crimson Dance of Khaine fell into your hands, and this is where it will end. For you, and for your last surviving heir."

traits.locale_text: {n}特拉金的目光锁定在塞贝里安身上，以及他手中的那把剑。太空死灵的语气变得尖刻，如同能灼伤灵魂的酸液。{/n}“看来你又找回了你那件珍贵的玩物，小贼……从某种意义上说，这还挺有纪念意义的。一切都始于这柄凯恩的猩红之舞落入你手之时，如今也将在此终结。不光是你，还有你那硕果仅存的继承人。”

languages.text: {n}Le regard de Trazyn se fixe sur Seberian et l'épée qu'il tient dans ses mains, puis il déclare sur un ton aussi caustique qu'un acide capable de brûler l'âme même :{/n} « Je vois que vous avez retrouvé votre précieux jouet, petit voleur... Un grand événement en soi. Cette histoire a commencé quand la Danse écarlate de Khaine est tombée entre vos mains, et c'est ainsi qu'elle s'achèvera également. Pour vous et votre {mf|dernier héritier|dernière héritière} encore en vie. »
languages.original_text: {n}Trazyn's gaze fixes on Seberian — and the sword he clutches in his hands. The Necron's tone becomes caustic, an acid that burns to the very soul.{/n} "I see you have found your precious toy once more, little thief.... This is a momentous occasion in its own way. This all began when the Crimson Dance of Khaine fell into your hands, and this is where it will end. For you, and for your last surviving heir."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le regard de Trazyn se fixe sur Seberian et l'épée qu'il tient dans ses mains, puis il déclare sur un ton aussi caustique qu'un acide capable de brûler l'âme même :{/n} « Je vois que vous avez retrouvé votre précieux jouet, petit voleur... Un grand événement en soi. Cette histoire a commencé quand la Danse écarlate de Khaine est tombée entre vos mains, et c'est ainsi qu'elle s'achèvera également. Pour vous et votre {mf|dernier héritier|dernière héritière} encore en vie. »

languages.text: {n}Trazyn'in bakışları Seberian'a ve ellerinde sıkıca tuttuğu kılıca sabitleniyor. Nekron'un tonu iğneleyici, ruhun ta derinliklerini yakan bir aside dönüşüyor.{/n} "Görüyorum ki kıymetli oyuncağını yine eline geçirmişsin küçük hırsız... Bu anın kendine has bir önemi var. Her şey, Khaine'in Kızıl Dansı senin ellerine düştüğünde başlamıştı. Sen ve sağ olan son vârisin için her şey burada son bulacak."
languages.original_text: {n}Trazyn's gaze fixes on Seberian — and the sword he clutches in his hands. The Necron's tone becomes caustic, an acid that burns to the very soul.{/n} "I see you have found your precious toy once more, little thief.... This is a momentous occasion in its own way. Her şey, Khaine'in Kızıl Dansı senin ellerine düştüğünde başlamıştı. Sen ve sağ olan son vârisin için her şey burada son bulacak."

languages.text: {n}Trazyn richtet seinen Blick auf Seberian — und das Schwert in seinen Händen. Die Stimme des Necrons gleicht einer Säure, die sich in die Seele brennt.{/n} "Wie ich sehe, hast du dein kostbares Spielzeug erneut gefunden, kleiner Dieb .... Das ist in gewisser Weise ein großer Moment. Alles begann, als dir Blutroter Tanz von Khaine in die Hände fiel, und hier wird es enden. Für dich und {mf|deinen letzten lebenden Erben|deine letzte lebende Erbin} ."
languages.original_text: {n}Trazyn's gaze fixes on Seberian — and the sword he clutches in his hands. The Necron's tone becomes caustic, an acid that burns to the very soul.{/n} "I see you have found your precious toy once more, little thief.... This is a momentous occasion in its own way. This all began when the Crimson Dance of Khaine fell into your hands, and this is where it will end. For you, and for your last surviving heir."

languages.text: {n}トラズンの視線はセベリアンに、そして彼が握る剣に釘付けになる。ネクロンの口調は激しく、魂を焦がすような酸味を帯びる。{/n}「貴様、またまた大切な玩具を見つけたようだな。この小さな泥棒。これは、ある意味、重要な出来事だ。この全ては、カイヌの血染めの舞踏が貴様の手に渡った時始まった。そして、ここで終わる。貴様と、最後の生き残った子孫のために。」
languages.original_text: {n}Trazyn's gaze fixes on Seberian — and the sword he clutches in his hands. The Necron's tone becomes caustic, an acid that burns to the very soul.{/n} "I see you have found your precious toy once more, little thief.... This is a momentous occasion in its own way. This all began when the Crimson Dance of Khaine fell into your hands, and this is where it will end. For you, and for your last surviving heir."
